# Myanmar Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Myanmar's administrative hierarchy:
> 15 state/regions, 77 districts, 491 townships, 17,043 ward/village tracts.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total state/regions: 15
- Total districts: 77
- Total townships: 491
- Total ward/village tracts: 17,043
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-06-01
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All state/regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All townships (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-township.json)
- [All ward/village tracts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-ward.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by State/Region

- [Kachin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kachin-MMR001/) — 4 districts, 33 townships, 780 ward/village tracts
- [Kayah](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kayah-MMR002/) — 2 districts, 10 townships, 124 ward/village tracts
- [Kayin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kayin-MMR003/) — 4 districts, 18 townships, 463 ward/village tracts
- [Chin](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chin-MMR004/) — 4 districts, 20 townships, 543 ward/village tracts
- [Sagaing](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sagaing-MMR005/) — 11 districts, 42 townships, 1889 ward/village tracts
- [Tanintharyi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tanintharyi-MMR006/) — 3 districts, 18 townships, 358 ward/village tracts
- [Bago](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bago-MMR007/) — 4 districts, 51 townships, 1804 ward/village tracts
- [Magway](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/magway-MMR009/) — 5 districts, 32 townships, 1677 ward/village tracts
- [Mandalay](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mandalay-MMR010/) — 7 districts, 34 townships, 1703 ward/village tracts
- [Mon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mon-MMR011/) — 2 districts, 17 townships, 494 ward/village tracts
- [Rakhine](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rakhine-MMR012/) — 5 districts, 28 townships, 1245 ward/village tracts
- [Yangon](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/yangon-MMR013/) — 4 districts, 49 townships, 1408 ward/village tracts
- [Shan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/shan-MMR014/) — 14 districts, 86 townships, 2077 ward/village tracts
- [Ayeyarwady](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/ayeyarwady-MMR017/) — 6 districts, 45 townships, 2230 ward/village tracts
- [Nay Pyi Taw](https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nay-pyi-taw-MMR018/) — 2 districts, 8 townships, 248 ward/village tracts

## Per-State/Region Full Data

- [Kachin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/kachin-MMR001.txt)

- [Chin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/chin-MMR004.txt)
- [Sagaing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sagaing-MMR005.txt)
- [Tanintharyi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tanintharyi-MMR006.txt)
- [Bago](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bago-MMR007.txt)
- [Magway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/magway-MMR009.txt)
- [Mandalay](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mandalay-MMR010.txt)
- [Mon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mon-MMR011.txt)
- [Rakhine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rakhine-MMR012.txt)
- [Yangon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/yangon-MMR013.txt)
- [Shan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/shan-MMR014.txt)
- [Ayeyarwady](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/ayeyarwady-MMR017.txt)
- [Nay Pyi Taw](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nay-pyi-taw-MMR018.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (state/region), 2 (district), 3 (township), 4 (ward/village tract)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Myanmar Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/myanmar-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
- [thailand-administrative-divisions](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions)
